## Description

Please describe your changes in detail.

## Motivation and Context

Why is this change required? What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?
If it addresses an open discussion or usage issue, please link to it here.
You can use the syntax `close #15213` if this resolves the issue #15213.

- [ ] I have raised an issue or discussion to propose this change ([required](https://github.com/callous-youth/BOAT/issues) for new features and structural changes)

## Types of changes

What types of changes does your code introduce? Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply:

- [ ] Fix / Optimization (non-breaking change which resolves an issue or improves performance)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds core functionality, e.g., a new atomic operation for GM, NA, or FO)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation (update in the Sphinx documentation)
- [ ] Example (update in the examples folder)


## Checklist

Please go over all the following points, and put an `x` in all the boxes that apply.
If you are unsure about any of these, don't hesitate to ask. We are here to help!

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/callous-youth/BOAT/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My change requires a change to the documentation.
- [ ] I have formatted the code using `black`.
